title: Xscape: The Mother's Day Love Affair
location: Fox Theatre, 660 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Iconic 90s R&B group Xscape reunites for a Mother's Day celebration. Perfect for couples who grew up on their music. An intimate, nostalgic night at the stunning Fox Theatre — one of Atlanta's most romantic venues.

title: Raue + Olive Vox @ The Masquerade
location: Altar at The Masquerade, 1374 West Peachtree St NW, Atlanta
description: Indie/alternative rock night at Atlanta's legendary Masquerade. Great energy, solid crowd, and the Altar room has an intimate vibe perfect for a date who loves live music.

title: Comedy Double Header feat. Teju Babyface
location: 3100 Avalon Ridge Pl NW, Peachtree Corners, GA
description: Two-bonus laugh track with Teju Babyface Organization & Sheyeto Productions. A well-curated double-header lineup — great for a date that loves to laugh together.

title: ATL BachaTuesdays — Salsa & Bachata Social
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta
description: Weekly Tuesday salsa and bachata social dance night. Great for beginners and experienced dancers alike. Free lesson often included. Perfect low-pressure date — you can dance close and nobody's watching too hard.

title: Jazz On The Rooftop — Virtue Rooftop
location: Virtue Rooftop (above 5Church Midtown), 46 4th St NW, Atlanta
description: Weekly rooftop jazz series with incredible Midtown views. Ideal for a Tuesday date — grab a cocktail, sit close, and enjoy live jazz as the sun goes down. Romantic without being cheesy.

title: Jazz In The Sky — Colony Square Helipad
location: Colony Square, 1197 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Elevated jazz experience atop Colony Square's Helipad with panoramic Midtown views. Intimate, limited-capacity event — very romantic for a couples evening out.

title: Uptown Comedy Corner: Guy'z Nite Out
location: Uptown Comedy Corner, 4730 Frontage Rd, Forest Park, GA
description: Atlanta's original comedy club delivers a solid mid-week laugh. Guy'z Nite Out is a great date choice — dim lights, good food, and guaranteed laughter. Less crowded than weekend shows.

title: MAJOR. — City Winery Atlanta
location: City Winery Atlanta, 650 2nd St NW, Atlanta
description: R&B/soul artist MAJOR. performs at City Winery's intimate space. If you two love smooth R&B and want a classy evening with wine, dinner, and live music — this is a premium date night pick.

title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 855 8th St NW, Atlanta
description: Weekly showcase of Atlanta's best up-and-coming comedians. Laughing Skull is a 21+ venue with a fun, unpretentious vibe. Great for couples who don't take themselves too seriously.

title: ATL BachaTuesdays — Salsa & Bachata Social
location: Academy Ballroom, 800 Miami Cir NE, Atlanta
description: Another edition of Atlanta's favorite weekly latin dance social. The crowd is friendly, the music is great, and it's an affordable way to spend a Tuesday night together.

title: Jazz On The Rooftop — Virtue Rooftop
location: Virtue Rooftop (above 5Church Midtown), 46 4th St NW, Atlanta
description: Another week, another rooftop jazz session. The Virtue Rooftop is a hidden gem in Midtown — perfect for couples who want something low-key but memorable.

title: Politically inCorrect — Fine Art Exhibition
location: Railroad ATL Future Gallery, 255 Ted Turner Drive SW, Atlanta
description: A bold group fine art exhibition exploring social and political themes through powerful visual art. A great cultural date for couples who like to talk, think, and be provoked. Free to attend.

title: R.A.S Memorial Weekend — 100% Reggae Afrobeat Soca
location: Underground Atlanta, 50 Lower Alabama St SW, Atlanta
description: Memorial Weekend kick-off with pure reggae, Afrobeat, and soca energy. Underground Atlanta is a one-of-a-kind venue with history and character. Get dressed up, dance close, and enjoy the Caribbean vibes all night long.

title: Reggae Fest Massive ATL — Mavado, Busy Signal, Spice & More
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: The biggest reggae event of the year in Atlanta. Mavado, Busy Signal, Beenie Man, Spice, Elephant Man, and more on one stage. For couples who love to dance and enjoy Caribbean culture — this is the experience.

title: Reggae Fest 2026 — Day 2
location: State Farm Arena, 191 Peachtree St NE, Atlanta
description: Second day of Atlanta's premier reggae festival. Even if you miss day one, day two delivers the same incredible lineup. A full afternoon/evening date that turns into a full night out.
